items.title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
items.summary: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.

items.title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
items.summary: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”

items.title: OpenAI poaches Uber India chief to lead its biggest market outside the US
items.summary: The hire marks OpenAI's latest push into India, expanding offices, partnerships and hiring.

items.title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
items.summary: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending. OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and...

items.title: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
items.summary: AI models have progressed to the point where their capabilities have real political consequences. Dealing with those consequences will require collective action.

items.title: OpenAI’s Jalapeño chip is Big Tech’s spiciest move away from Nvidia
items.summary: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending. OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and...

items.title: Early Bird pricing ends tonight for TechCrunch Founder Summit
items.summary: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026. Early Bird pricing ends today, at 11:59 p.m. PT, after which rates increase. Register now.

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
